html:
Exclusive to:

Tillweeds are a Vegetable Food exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.

Tillweeds can be harvested from a Tillweed. They are used to prepare Tillweed Salve.

Contents

  • 1 Dried Tillweed
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Dried Tillweed

Dried Tillweeds are made from drying Tillweeds on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Tillweed Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Trivia

  • Tillweeds were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.

Gallery

  • Tea concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“Out of my garden, you!”
–Wilson
“Stupid weed.”
–Willow
“Took Wolfgang ages to get out of garden!”
–Wolfgang
“A most stubborn weed.”
–Wendy
“I WILL RIP YOU AND ALL YOUR KIN OUT OF MY GARDEN”
–WX-78
“What a nuisance!”
–Wickerbottom
“It sure doesn't give up without a fight.”
–Woodie
“Nuisance.”
–Maxwell
“Remöve yöurself fröm my sight, cöwardly weed!”
–Wigfrid
“It likes to make a mess of our garden.”
–Webber
“I'm afraid you're bothering the other plants, mon ami.”
–Warly
“Stubborn friends”
–Wormwood
“Stubborn rascals.”
–Winona
“Till what, weed?”
–Wortox
“What is difference between weeds and other plants?”
–Wurt
“Hey! No weeds allowed in the garden!”
–Walter
“That doesn't look like it belongs...”
–Wanda
Tillweeds are a Vegetable Food exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.
Tillweeds can be harvested from a Tillweed. They are used to prepare Tillweed Salve.

Tillweed là một loại Rau củ độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them.

'''Tillweeds''' are a [[Vegetables|Vegetable]] [[Food]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''.

Tillweeds can be harvested from a [[Tillweed]]. They are used to prepare [[Tillweed Salve]].
__toc__
{{clear}}

'''Dried Tillweeds''' are made from drying Tillweeds on the [[Drying Rack/DST|Drying Rack]]. They can be used to make [[Tillweed Tea]] at [[Pearl's Tea Shop]].
